items.name_en: Code: 666242 💄[MCM] New Fall/Winter SOFT BERLIN Retro Mini Square Bag: The design inspiration for the Berlin series comes from MCM's roots in travel. This waist bag exudes feminine elegance, drawing design inspiration from classic hard suitcases. It features a detachable leather crossbody strap, a top leather handle, a laurel leaf carved closure mechanism, 2 internal compartments, a side zipper pocket and card slot, silver metal protective feet, and fabric lining ❤️ Dimensions: 12x15x7

items.name_en: Travel Bag 💫MCM💫 Traveler Visetos Weekend Travel Bag. Made of durable Visetos print 🌺 coated canvas and bonded lining, this item reduces weight and is one of our top lightweight Visetos weekend ✈️ travel bags. This classic design features an easy-to-close extended ⛓️ zipper and can be folded for storage when not in use. Dimensions: Length 50cm, Height 29cm, Bottom Thickness 20cm

items.name_en: Code: 666703, New MCM Toni Visetos Shopping Bag New Look, Super Beautiful 👗 This small shopping bag is versatile and timeless. Don't be fooled by the size of this mini shopping bag; it features spacious compartments both inside and out to store all your small essentials. The cotton canvas lining features a street fashion-inspired print, subtly preserving MCM's adventurous aesthetic spirit. With the included crossbody strap, it offers hands-free functionality and better portability. No ❤️ charm Size: 18.5x19x9.5cm Bag opening width: 26cm Removable adjustable shoulder strap Zipper closure External back slit pocket Internal zip pocket Internal open pocket Leather trim Nappa leather trim Metal-tone hardware Fabric lining External D-ring decoration

Medium Chain Bag
🔗Millie Visetos Crossbody Bag, MCM's long history is revealed through every feature of the Millie series 😇 Made of lightweight Visetos material and trimmed with Nappa leather, it is a classic modern on-the-go bag. It combines dynamic portability with classic elegance with a removable crossbody strap and laurel lock. items.name_cn:
New Horn Bag
🇩🇪MCM🇩🇪 Original Stock 2024 New Horn Bag AREN VISETOS HOBO Shoulder Bag
This Visetos Hobo bag features a design with a 🐂 adjustable leather shoulder strap and a leather tag with a lock 🔒. It offers a modern reinterpretation of a classic casual style, striking an ideal balance between softness and structure. This small-sized Aren Hobo shoulder bag incorporates design elements from traditional 🇩🇪MCM🇩🇪 luggage, including a removable leather tag and an engraved logo lock, adding a finishing touch.
Material: PVC with cowhide
Color: White
Dimensions: 26x19x9.5cm
